positive: A cosmic mountain range silhouette against a deeply gradient sunset sky. The mountains are sharp, geometric peaks, suggesting ancient, powerful energy. The sky transitions from deep indigo at the top to vibrant coral and gold near the horizon line. Incorporate subtle nebula cloud elements and scattering of stylized, geometric stars. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, maximizing the negative space for apparel print versatility. Art Deco meets Cosmic Surrealism. High contrast, vaporwave aesthetic, ultra detailed, perfect for screen printing, clean lines, vector-quality illustration, octane render.
